summary: Ukrainian forces downed a Russian Ka-52 attack helicopter near Nadiivka in Donetsk region, with FPV drones striking the crew after a crash landing and during evacuation attempts. The 59th Brigade destroyed another Ka-52 on the Pokrovsk axis using an FPV drone, a rare helicopter kill by this method, later recognized by Zelensky with the Order of Courage, 2nd class. Elsewhere, an FPV drone struck a Ukrainian BUK air defense system near Bolshoy Sokolny Island, and Iranian-backed militias used a fiber-optic FPV drone to attack the US Victory Base near Baghdad International Airport. Ukrainian pilots employed tactics like throwing riders off horses before striking, and footage showed infantrymen charging drones with bayonets or being hit by multiple simultaneous FPV strikes.
